title: Finalize compiler parity and stdlib/runtime tests

source.subject: Finalize compiler parity and stdlib/runtime test updates

body:
Merges remaining parity fixes and refreshes stdlib/runtime tests so the compiler baseline matches expected v0.1 behavior before later module-semantics work.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`1f8d62d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/1f8d62d)
- **Subject:** Finalize compiler parity and stdlib/runtime test updates
- **Completed:** 2026-04-09

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-foundation`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-compiler-parity`

## Relation
Closes deliverable **v01-compiler-parity** (`1f8d62d`).
